new_terms.context: consolidation toward the large players who have high volumes and negotiating power for DRAM such as OpenAI, Coreweave and the Cloud Hyperscalers
CPU ASP is only a minor part of system cost
CPU vendors are fearful of memory double ordering that exacerbates the perceived memory shortage
far outweighs the cost of the CPU and the rest of the server chassis
still gobbled up by high margin AI accelerators
throughput and power efficiency are prioritized
